name: Update eco news with invalid data -- @1.2
fullName: Update Eco News: Update eco news with invalid data

steps.name: Given the user is authorized

When I send PUT request to update eco news with id 78 and {"id":"78","source":"source","shortInfo":"Upcoming environmental event","tags":["events"],"title":"Upcoming environmental event","content":"Full article text here","titleTranslation":{"content":"Environmental Event","languageCode":"en"},"textTranslation":{"content":"Event details and registration info","languageCode":"en"}}:
Then the response status code should be 404
And the response message should be Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 78

parameters.name: data
parameters.value: {"id":"78","source":"source","shortInfo":"Upcoming environmental event","tags":["events"],"title":"Upcoming environmental event","content":"Full article text here","titleTranslation":{"content":"Environmental Event","languageCode":"en"},"textTranslation":{"content":"Event details and registration info","languageCode":"en"}}

parameters.name: message
parameters.value: Eco new doesn't exist by this id: 78

parameterValues: {"id":"78","source":"source","shortInfo":"Upcoming environmental event","tags":["events"],"title":"Upcoming environmental event","content":"Full article text here","titleTranslation":{"content":"Environmental Event","languageCode":"en"},"textTranslation":{"content":"Event details and registration info","languageCode":"en"}}
